app.name: eurovisionmaxxing
app.tagline: The group-chat way to watch Eurovision
app.description: Turn the contest into your own voting game. Rate every country, stir up the group chat live, and end the night with a proper 12-points announcement.
app.metaDescription: Eurovision watch party voting app — vote, announce, crown the winner.
app.featuresLine: Vote live · Any device · Jury-style reveal

displayName.label: Your display name
displayName.hint: Use 2–24 letters, numbers, spaces, or hyphens.

avatar.title: Choose your avatar
avatar.tapHint: Tap your avatar to change it.

submit.error: Couldn't create your identity. Try again.

classic.name: The Classic
classic.description: For fans who want to be fair and thorough.

spectacle.name: The Spectacle
spectacle.description: For when you want to reward the unhinged.

bangerTest.name: The Banger Test
bangerTest.description: For when the group wants to find the actual best song.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Build your own categories from scratch.

live.tagline: Take turns announcing your points, Eurovision-style.
live.long: Great with a TV. Each user reveals their 1 → 12 in turn.

instant.tagline: Reveal the winner in one shot.
instant.long: Great if you're short on time. Everyone marks themselves ready, then the leaderboard appears.

vocals.name: Vocals
vocals.hint: Technical delivery and control — not just whether you like the style

outfit.name: Outfit
outfit.hint: The look. Does it serve? Does it commit?

stagePerformance.name: Stage performance
stagePerformance.hint: Movement, energy, use of the stage

vibes.name: Vibes
vibes.hint: The ineffable. How did it make you feel?

drama.name: Drama
drama.hint: How much did it make you gasp, clutch pearls, or lean forward?

costumeCommitment.name: Costume commitment
costumeCommitment.hint: Not just nice — how hard did they go? Full send?

stagingChaos.name: Staging chaos
stagingChaos.hint: Was it controlled insanity or just confused? Reward the former.

gayPanicLevel.name: Gay panic level
gayPanicLevel.hint: The campness. The queerness. The iconography.

quotability.name: Quotability
quotability.hint: Will you still be referencing this in November?

catchiness.name: Catchiness
catchiness.hint: Could you hum it 10 minutes later?

lyrics.name: Lyrics
lyrics.hint: What are they actually saying? Does it hold up?

toast.body: Marked missed — we'll estimate your scores as ~{overall}.

hint.onboarding: Tap ⓘ on a category to hide its hint.

endOfVoting.allScored: ✅ All {count} scored — waiting for {admin} to end voting.
endOfVoting.allScoredFallback: ✅ All {count} scored — waiting for the host to end voting.
endOfVoting.missedSome: ⚠️ You marked {count} as missed — they'll be filled with your average. Tap to rescore any.
endOfVoting.roomMomentum: ⏳ Most of the room has finished — you have {count} still to score.

host.allDone: 🎉 Everyone's done — ready to end voting?
host.mostDone: ⏳ {ready} of {total} have finished — give the rest a moment, then end voting.
host.selfDoneOnly: ✅ Your vote is in — {ready} of {total} done so far.

modal.title: End voting?
modal.body: Tapping End voting starts a 5-second countdown. You can tap Undo during the countdown to cancel.

errors.INVALID_BODY: Something about your request was invalid.
errors.INVALID_DISPLAY_NAME: Display name must be 2–24 characters: letters, numbers, spaces, or hyphens.
errors.INVALID_ROOM_ID: That room link doesn't look right. Double-check the URL?
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: Your session has expired. Please rejoin.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.

placeholders.lobby: This room hasn't started voting yet. Check back after the show.
placeholders.voting: Voting is still in progress. Results will be available once the admin ends voting.
placeholders.roomNotFound: We couldn't find that room. Double-check the link?

scoring.title: Tallying results…
scoring.subtitle: Hold tight — we're crunching the numbers.

lobby.callToJoin: Open eurovisionmaxxing.com and enter the PIN to join.
lobby.memberCount: {count, plural, =0 {Waiting for guests…} =1 {1 person here} other {# people here}}

voting.title: Score the songs on your phone.

refreshContestants.upToDate: Already up to date — nothing changed.
refreshContestants.summary: {added, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 added · } other {# added · }}{removed, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 dropped · } other {# dropped · }}{reordered, plural, =0 {} =1 {1 reordered} other {# reordered}}

instantAnnounce.lede: Voting's done. Here are the points you gave — tap when you're ready to see the room's leaderboard.

ownResults.title: Your top picks
ownResults.subtitle: These are the Eurovision points you gave each country. The leaderboard is hidden until everyone's ready.
ownResults.empty: You didn't score any contestants this round.

ready.button: I'm done — let the host know
ready.subtitle: The host reveals when everyone's set.
ready.waiting: You're ready. Waiting on {count} more — the host reveals when everyone's set.

admin.hostHeading: As host, you decide when to reveal.
admin.hostSubtitle: Pick one of the three below.
admin.revealAllSublineReady: Everyone marked ready ({ready}/{total}). Tap to show the leaderboard.
admin.revealAnywaySublineHalf: Half the room is ready ({ready}/{total}) — fine to reveal.
admin.revealAnywaySublineDisabled: Unlocks once half are ready, or 60s after the first.
admin.overrideSubline: Bypasses the wait. Use if folks aren't responsive.
admin.overrideConfirmBody: Everyone will see the group's leaderboard immediately, even if they haven't marked ready.

ceremony.title: And the awards go to…
ceremony.advanceHint: Tap anywhere to reveal the next award

explainers.harshest_critic: Lowest average score given across all the contestants you voted on.
explainers.biggest_stan: Highest average score given across all the contestants you voted on.
explainers.hive_mind_master: Your ranking lined up most closely with how the room voted overall.
explainers.most_contrarian: Your ranking was the furthest from the room's overall ranking.
explainers.neighbourhood_voters: You and one other person voted most alike — your scores moved up and down together more than anyone else's.
explainers.the_dark_horse: The contestant the room disagreed most about — some loved them, some hated them.
explainers.fashion_stan: You gave the single highest score in the outfit / costume category.
explainers.the_enabler: You gave your 12 points to the room's overall winner.
